title: thapsus linnaei
intro: Thapsus linnaei, also known as Thapsia, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and antispasmodic properties, which help to expel intestinal worms and ease muscle spasms. The health benefits of Thapsus linnaei include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Thapsus linnaei include dried roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
